scripts.build:slim:win: node build/prepare-python.js slim && electron-builder --win --config build/slim.json --publish never

scripts.build:slim:mac: node build/prepare-python.js slim && electron-builder --mac --config build/slim.json --publish never
scripts.build:linux: node build/prepare-python.js slim && electron-builder --linux --config build/slim.json --publish never
scripts.build:slim:win:x64: node build/prepare-python.js slim --arch=x64 && electron-builder --win --x64 --config build/slim.json --publish never
scripts.build:web:win:x64: node build/prepare-python.js slim --arch=x64 && electron-builder --win --x64 --config build/web.json --publish never
scripts.build:slim:mac:x64: node build/prepare-python.js slim --arch=x64 && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config build/slim.json --publish never
scripts.build:slim:mac:arm64: node build/prepare-python.js slim --arch=arm64 && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config build/slim.json --publish never
